error_signature: no way to present download link in chatbot
title: Unable to provide file download link in chatbot
symptom: The chatbot can retrieve binary content but cannot present a download link for users.
applies_when: Need to provide file downloads to users
not_this_if: Files are being downloaded directly without issues
root_cause: The chatbot does not have a built-in mechanism to serve files directly to users. Instead, it requires a webhook setup to handle download requests and serve files with the appropriate headers.
fix_steps: Set up a Webhook node to receive download requests with a file ID parameter.
Use the Respond to Webhook node to set the headers: 'Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="your-file.ext"'.
Set the response body to your binary data.
Store the binary data temporarily with a unique ID.
Return a download URL in your chat response.
agent_instruction: Create a webhook to serve file downloads with proper headers and return the URL in the chat response.
